title: extreterrestrial news drop: sora's now on android 👽 check it out in canada, japan, korea, taiwan, thailand, US, and vietnam !
description: extreterrestrial news drop: sora's now on android 👽 check it out in canada, japan, korea, taiwan, thailand, US, and vietnam !
prompt_text: A comedic outdoor news report scene set in a vast, open grassy field under an overcast sky. A female news reporter, with dark hair and wearing a dark blue suit over a light turtleneck, holds a microphone with a 'NEWS' logo. She stands beside an alien character, who has vivid green skin, large, dark eyes, and is dressed in a casual beige hoodie underneath a brown jacket with matching pants. Hovering directly above them in the sky is a sleek, dark flying saucer/UFO with glowing blue lights. The lighting is natural, soft, and even, indicative of an overcast day.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A comedic outdoor news report scene set in a vast, open grassy field under an overcast sky. A female news reporter, with dark hair and wearing a dark blue suit over a light turtleneck, holds a microphone with a 'NEWS' logo. She stands beside an alien character, who has vivid green skin, large, dark eyes, and is dressed in a casual beige hoodie underneath a brown jacket with matching pants. Hovering directly above them in the sky is a sleek, dark flying saucer/UFO with glowing blue lights. The lighting is natural, soft, and even, indicative of an overcast day.

cinematography.mood: Initially serious and reportorial, quickly transitioning to humorous, absurd, and energetic.
cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, vertically framed, capturing both characters from the waist up. The camera is static throughout the scene.

actions: The female reporter holds her microphone and speaks to the alien, gesturing slightly with her free hand.
The alien listens intently, then responds, gesturing with its hands.
The alien's eyes briefly glow with an orange hue as it speaks.
The reporter reacts with surprise and drops her microphone.
The reporter lets out a loud scream.
The alien appears to playfully 'grab' at the reporter as a distinct musical beat drops.
Both the reporter and the alien begin to move their arms in a sudden, synchronized, and exaggerated celebratory dance-like fashion.
dialogue: Reporter: I'm here with what appears to be an alien who apparently has a message for us.
Alien: That's right, thank you. I'm here to report that Sora is now on Android.
